principles: Data over Decoration: Every pixel must serve information clarity.
Terminal Aesthetic: Use monospace fonts for hierarchy, not just code.
Signal vs. Noise: High contrast for status/alerts, low contrast for structure.
Motion as Feedback: Blink, pulse, and slide to mimic active machinery.

StatusIndicator.description: A pulsing dot indicating bot health.
StatusIndicator.styles: h-3 w-3 rounded-full bg-primary animate-pulse shadow-[0_0_10px_#00ff9d]

StatsCard.styles: bg-card border border-border/50 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors p-6 rounded-lg flex flex-col items-start gap-2 relative overflow-hidden group

TerminalWindow.description: Container for the main dashboard content.
TerminalWindow.styles: bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-border rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden font-mono

effects: Scanlines overlay (pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 opacity-[0.03] bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')])

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Ensure Tailwind is configured for 'class' dark mode.
2. FONT: Import 'JetBrains Mono' and 'Inter' from Google Fonts in index.css.
3. LAYOUT: Create a single page dashboard. Use a 'max-w-5xl' container centered horizontally.
4. HEADER: Left: 'BOT_NAME' in JetBrains Mono (Bold). Right: 'ONLINE' badge with pulsing green dot.
5. HERO: Use the Bento Grid layout for stats (Uptime, Users, Groups, Latency). Use the provided hero_background as a subtle subtle overlay or section background with low opacity.
6. COMMANDS: Create a 'System Commands' section. Use Shadcn Accordion. Each item header is the command (e.g., '/ban'). Content is the description and usage usage syntax.
8. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Add hover effects to all cards (border color change to primary). Add a copy-to-clipboard button for command syntax.
9. DATA-TESTID: Add 'data-testid' to the status indicator, each command item, and stat cards.
10. THEME: Force Dark Mode by default. Do not add a toggle unless necessary (user asked for dark theme).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use gradients for text.
Do not center align the app container (.App { text-align: center }).
